name: dc-shin
description: Turns agent-written design, analysis, and spec documents into rich, self-contained visual HTML - diagrams, charts, highlighted code, and math - so people and agents communicate more clearly than with plain Markdown.

plugins.name: visual-docs
plugins.description: Produces design, analysis, and spec documents as rich, self-contained HTML files with Mermaid diagrams, Chart.js charts, syntax highlighting, and math formulas - instead of plain Markdown.
